ai_research.headline: Claude 4.6 Opus drops with 1M context — agent builders, your move

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6 launches with 1M context window
items.body: Anthropic shipped Opus 4.6 with a million-token context window and significantly improved agentic capabilities. This is the most capable coding and reasoning model available. If you're building agents on Claude, this changes what's possible with single-pass context.

items.title: DeepSeek-R2 rumors intensify
items.body: Multiple sources suggest DeepSeek is preparing R2, their next reasoning model. Expected to match or beat o3 on math/code benchmarks at a fraction of the cost. China's open-weight strategy continues to pressure US labs on pricing.

items.title: Google releases Gemini 2.5 Pro with native tool use
items.body: Gemini 2.5 Pro now supports structured tool calling natively, catching up to Claude's tool use. The 1M context window and multimodal capabilities make it a serious contender for agent architectures.

items.title: Auto-research agents paper from Stanford
items.body: New Stanford paper demonstrates agents that can autonomously design and run ML experiments, iterating on hypotheses without human intervention. Early but compelling results for AI-driven R&D workflows.

items.title: xAI opens Grok API to more developers
items.body: xAI expanded Grok API access with new tiers and reduced pricing. Grok-3 now available with search grounding, making it viable for real-time information retrieval in agent pipelines.

ai_research.learn_today: Try Claude Opus 4.6's extended context — load an entire codebase into one prompt and see how it handles complex refactors.

openclaw_agents.headline: MCP ecosystem exploding — 50+ new servers this week

items.title: MCP server registry hits 500+ integrations
items.body: The Model Context Protocol ecosystem is growing fast. New servers for Slack, Linear, Notion, and dozens of developer tools shipped this week. The composability story is becoming real.
items.try_this: Add an MCP server to your OpenClaw setup — try the GitHub or Linear integration for automated ticket triage.

items.title: Claude Code ships Agent SDK improvements
items.body: Anthropic's Claude Code got multi-agent orchestration improvements. Sub-agents can now run in parallel with isolated worktrees, and the tool system supports deferred loading for better performance.
items.try_this: Use Claude Code's Agent tool to parallelize independent research tasks in your workflows.

items.title: LangGraph adds human-in-the-loop primitives
items.body: LangGraph 0.4 shipped with first-class support for human approval steps, breakpoints, and state persistence. Makes it much easier to build agents that pause for human review on critical decisions.

items.title: Prompt caching now available on Claude API
items.body: Anthropic's prompt caching can cut costs by 90% for repeated system prompts. If your agents use the same system prompt across many calls, this is free money.
items.try_this: Enable prompt caching on your OpenClaw system prompts — check the Anthropic docs for cache_control blocks.

openclaw_agents.try_today: Audit your agent's system prompts — are you using prompt caching? You could be saving 90% on repeated context.

tesla.note: Robotaxi reveal timeline still Q3 — street wants more details on regulatory path

tesla_spacex_xai.spacex: Starship Flight 8 targeting April — full stack reuse attempt
tesla_spacex_xai.xai: Grok-3 API pricing dropped 40% — xAI pushing for developer adoption

items.title: Warfare
items.note: A24 war film shot in real-time — visceral and innovative filmmaking.

items.title: Black Mirror S7
items.note: New season drops this week. The AI episodes are actually good this time.

items.title: The Electric State
items.note: Russo brothers + Millie Bobby Brown. Visually cool, story is mid.

items.title: Sinners
items.note: Ryan Coogler + Michael B. Jordan — genre mashup that actually works.

items.title: TikTok AI video generator now in open beta
items.body: TikTok's built-in AI video creation tool is available to all business accounts. Generate short-form video ads from text prompts. Early results show 2x engagement vs static ads for app installs.

items.title: Reddit conversation ads getting traction
items.body: Reddit's conversation placement ads are showing strong results for app marketing. You can target specific subreddits and appear naturally in comment threads. CPIs running 40% below Meta for niche apps.

items.title: Opus Clip 4.0 ships AI b-roll and auto-captions
items.body: Opus Clip's latest update generates b-roll footage and styled captions automatically. One long video becomes 10 optimized clips for different platforms. Great for QuizzyDots content repurposing.

macro.mood: Risk-off vibes — tariff anxiety dragging everything down, tech leading the sell-off.
